description_long: This object consists of a group of six multirotor drones, each with a distinct design and color scheme. The drones vary in size, with the largest featuring a blue and red body and prominent landing gear, while the smallest is compact and streamlined. Most drones have four rotors arranged in a quadcopter configuration, with visible propellers and arms extending from the central body. The materials appear to be a mix of lightweight plastics and metals, with some drones featuring visible cameras and landing gear. The color palette includes blue, gray, brown, white, and metallic finishes, giving each drone a unique appearance. These drones are typically used for aerial photography, surveillance, or recreational flying in urban environments.
description: A group of six visually distinct quadcopter drones, each with unique colors, sizes, and features such as cameras and landing gear.
description_view_0: The front view shows all six drones in a line, highlighting their varying sizes, colors, and the prominent blue and red drone in the foreground.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the depth and arrangement of the drones, with the blue and red drone on the left and the metallic drone on the right.
description_view_2: From this angle, the metallic drone is most prominent in the foreground, with the other drones receding into the background.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back sides of the drones, with the blue and red drone now on the right and the metallic drone on the left.
